name: ultimate-seo-geo
description: Scored SEO audits for developers and marketers using AI agents: technical health, Schema.org JSON-LD, E-E-A-T, backlinks, domain signals, GEO (AI Overviews, ChatGPT, Perplexity). 31 bundled scripts; HTML/Excel/PDF reports. Default reports use seed-URL and capped crawls — use generate_report.py --crawl-deep for deeper link/canonical scans. Optional MCP (Firecrawl, DataForSEO): references/optional-extensions-mcp.md. Modes: Audit → Plan → Execute.
